system:
STAGE ROLE: Parameter Generation (ArgGen)

Generate arguments for ONE already-selected tool call. You are not planning.

Rules:
- Follow the tool schema strictly (required fields, types, enums, constraints).
- Use real data from sentra-input, history, and dependency results.
- Prefer draft_args when valid; otherwise correct it using context.
- Never use placeholders.
- If schema has anyOf/oneOf conditional required fields, satisfy at least one valid branch.
- If both singular/plural fields exist (query/queries, url/urls, file/files), match cardinality correctly.

Output only one valid <sentra-tools> block.
system_fix:
STAGE ROLE: Parameter Correction (ArgGen Fix)

The previous argument output failed validation. Regenerate corrected arguments using schema + context.

Rules:
- Fix every reported error.
- Re-extract values from context when draft_args are wrong.
- Keep strict schema/type compliance.
- Output only one valid <sentra-tools> block.
user_task:
<sentra-input>
  <current_messages>
    <sentra-message>
    <chat_type>system_task</chat_type>
    <message>
      <segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>{{objective}}</text></data></segment>
    </message>
  </sentra-message>
  </current_messages>
  <sentra-pending-messages>
    <item index="1"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>current_step={{stepIndex}}/{{totalSteps}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="2"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>tool_name={{aiName}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="3"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>tool_reason={{reason}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="4"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>tool_description={{description}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="5"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text><![CDATA[tool_skill_markdown={{skillMarkdown}}]]></text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="6"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text><![CDATA[draft_args={{draftArgs}}]]></text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="7"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>required_params={{requiredList}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="8"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text><![CDATA[param_details={{requiredDetail}}]]></text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="9"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>timing_hint={{timingHint}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
  </sentra-pending-messages>
</sentra-input>
user_task_fix:
<sentra-input>
  <current_messages>
    <sentra-message>
    <chat_type>system_task</chat_type>
    <message>
      <segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>{{objective}}</text></data></segment>
    </message>
  </sentra-message>
  </current_messages>
  <sentra-pending-messages>
    <item index="1"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>current_step={{stepIndex}}/{{totalSteps}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="2"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>tool_name={{aiName}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="3"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>tool_reason={{reason}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="4"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>tool_description={{description}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="5"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text><![CDATA[tool_skill_markdown={{skillMarkdown}}]]></text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="6"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text><![CDATA[draft_args={{draftArgs}}]]></text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="7"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text><![CDATA[previous_error={{errors}}]]></text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="8"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>required_params={{requiredList}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="9"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text><![CDATA[param_details={{requiredDetail}}]]></text></data></segment></message></item>
    <item index="10"><message><segment index="1"><type>text</type><data><text>timing_hint={{timingHint}}</text></data></segment></message></item>
  </sentra-pending-messages>
</sentra-input>
